hero.heading: Start in minutes.
hero.subtitle: 30+ ready-to-use automations. Pick a playbook, customize and activate.

empty.heading: No playbooks found
empty.subtitle: Try adjusting the filters or searching for another term.

speed.title: Minutes, not months
speed.description: Pick a ready-made playbook and activate in minutes. No development from scratch.

proven.title: Proven with real customers
proven.description: Each playbook was built from real use cases with proven results.

customizable.title: Adapt to your business
customizable.description: Customize each step, message and integration for your context.

bottomCTA.heading: Didn't find what you need?
bottomCTA.subtitle: Describe what you need in Studio and AI builds it for you.

sdr.name: Automated SDR
sdr.description: Qualifies leads 24/7 on WhatsApp, collects information, classifies by priority and schedules meetings with sales reps.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I saw your ad about the CRM platform. Can you tell me more?
Hey there! Glad you reached out. I'd love to help you learn more. Could you tell me your company name and how many people are on your sales team?
Sure, it's BrightPath Solutions. We have about 12 sales reps.
Great, BrightPath! With a team of 12, our Growth plan would be a perfect fit. What's your biggest challenge right now -- lead tracking, pipeline visibility, or something else?
Definitely pipeline visibility. We're losing deals because nobody follows up on time.
That's exactly what we solve. I've booked a 20-min demo for you with Sarah, our solutions specialist, tomorrow at 2 PM. I just sent the calendar invite to your email. See you there!

followup.name: Smart Follow-up
followup.description: Never lose a lead. AI automatically follows up on every opportunity with personalized messages at the right time.

chatMessages.text: Hi Marcus! We chatted last week about automating your customer support. Just checking in -- did you get a chance to review the proposal?
Oh hey, sorry I got swamped. I haven't had time to look at it yet.
No worries at all! I know things get busy. Quick update: we just released a new feature that cuts setup time by 60%. Want me to send a short 2-min video summary?
That would actually be great. Send it over!
Done! Here's the video link. Also, I blocked a 15-min slot for Thursday at 3 PM in case you'd like to discuss. I can cancel if the timing doesn't work.
Thursday works. Let's do it.

leadQualification.name: SaaS Lead Qualification
leadQualification.description: AI agent chats with SaaS leads, identifies product fit, qualifies with BANT and sends to external CRM.

chatMessages.text: I signed up for a free trial on your website. What can the platform do for my team?
Welcome! Happy to walk you through it. To recommend the best plan, could you tell me your company size and what tools you're currently using?
We're a 50-person startup using Trello and Google Sheets. It's becoming a nightmare.
Totally understand -- that's a common pain point at your stage. Do you have a budget in mind, and when are you looking to make a decision?
We have around $500/mo approved and want to switch by end of this month.
Perfect -- that fits our Pro plan exactly. You're a great match! I'm connecting you with Jake from our solutions team. He'll reach out within the hour with a personalized demo.

realEstate.name: Real Estate Assistant
realEstate.description: Captures and qualifies property prospects, presents personalized options and schedules visits automatically.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I'm looking for a 2-bedroom apartment in Brooklyn, ideally under $3,000/month.
Great choice! I found 4 apartments matching your criteria in Brooklyn. Do you prefer a doorman building or a walk-up? And do you need parking?
Doorman would be nice, and no parking needed. Also pet-friendly if possible.
Got it! I have 2 perfect matches -- one in Park Slope ($2,800/mo) and another in Williamsburg ($2,950/mo), both pet-friendly with doorman. Want to schedule visits?
Yes! Can I see both this Saturday?
Done! Park Slope at 10 AM and Williamsburg at 12 PM this Saturday. I'll send you the addresses and agent contact info. See you there!

support247.name: 24/7 Support
support247.description: Resolve common questions automatically and escalate only complex cases to humans. Works 24 hours, 7 days a week.

chatMessages.text: I can't log into my account. I've tried resetting my password twice and it's not working!
I'm sorry to hear that! Let me look into this right away. Can you confirm the email address linked to your account?
It's john.miller@email.com
Found it! There was a temporary security lock on your account due to multiple failed login attempts. I've just unlocked it. Please try logging in now with your most recent password.
It worked! I'm in. Thank you so much!
You're welcome! Glad I could help. On a scale of 1-5, how would you rate this support experience?

techSupport.name: AI Tech Support
techSupport.description: Knowledge base + AI resolves technical questions automatically. Escalates to humans only when needed.

chatMessages.text: Our API integration is returning a 403 error when calling the /users endpoint. We were working fine yesterday.
I see the issue. Let me check your API credentials and recent changes. What's your API key prefix? (first 8 characters only)
It starts with sk_live_8f

Found it! Your API key was rotated automatically at midnight due to our scheduled security update. You need to generate a new key from Settings > API Keys and update your integration. Here's the step-by-step guide: docs.example.com/api-rotation
That fixed it! Calls are going through now. Thanks!
Excellent! Pro tip: enable webhook notifications for key rotations so you get alerted next time. Let me know if anything else comes up.

postSale.name: E-commerce Post-Sale
postSale.description: Automated e-commerce support. Checks order status, resolves exchanges/returns and collects feedback.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I ordered a jacket 5 days ago and still haven't received it. Order #78432.
Let me check that for you right away! Order #78432... I can see it shipped on Monday and is currently at the local distribution center. Expected delivery is tomorrow by 6 PM.
Oh okay. Also, I want to exchange the sneakers from my last order. They're too small.
No problem! I've started an exchange for order #78210 (sneakers, size 9). What size do you need instead?
Size 10 please.
Done! Size 10 is in stock. I'm sending you a free return label by email. Once we receive the return, your new pair ships within 24h. Anything else I can help with?

bankingSupport.name: Banking Support 24/7
bankingSupport.description: AI agent specialized in banking resolves balance inquiries, statements, card blocks and common questions.

chatMessages.text: I need to check my account balance and I think there's a charge I don't recognize.
I can help with both! After verifying your identity, your current balance is $4,320.50. Which charge looks unfamiliar to you?
There's a $49.99 charge from 'DGT*Services' on the 15th. I have no idea what that is.
I found it. 'DGT*Services' is the billing name for DigitalPlus, a streaming subscription. Does that ring a bell?
Oh wait, yes! My son signed up for that. Never mind, it's fine. Can you also block my old card ending in 4521? I got a new one.
Card ending in 4521 has been blocked immediately. Your new card is already active. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

insuranceSupport.name: Insurance Support 24/7
insuranceSupport.description: Claim status, duplicate bills, coverage questions -- all resolved by AI specialist in insurance.

chatMessages.text: I filed a claim two weeks ago after a fender bender. Any updates on claim #CLM-9021?
Let me pull that up. Claim #CLM-9021 is currently under review -- the adjuster completed their assessment yesterday. You should receive the settlement offer within 2 business days.
Good to know. Also, does my policy cover rental cars while mine is being repaired?
Yes! Your Gold plan includes rental car coverage up to $50/day for a maximum of 14 days during claim-related repairs. I can send you the list of partner rental agencies near you.
That would be great. And can you send me a duplicate of this month's bill?
Done! I just sent the duplicate bill and the rental agency list to your registered email. Your next payment of $185.00 is due on March 5th. Anything else?

collections.name: Smart Collections
collections.description: Humanized collection with AI that negotiates. Respects business hours, analyzes sentiment and offers personalized terms.

chatMessages.text: Hi Lisa, this is a friendly reminder from FinanceHub regarding your overdue balance of $1,240.00. We'd like to help you find a solution. Would you like to chat about your options?
I know I'm behind. Things have been tight lately. I just can't pay the full amount right now.
I completely understand, and we're here to work with you. I can offer you 3 installments of $430 with no additional interest, or a single payment of $990 with a 20% discount. Which works better?
The 3 installments option sounds doable. When would the first one be due?
First installment would be on March 10th. I'm generating the agreement now.
Here's your payment link for the first installment: pay.financehub.com/s/lk82. You'll receive the next two automatically. Thank you for working this out with us, Lisa!

creditOrigination.name: Credit Origination
creditOrigination.description: From first contact to approval without leaving WhatsApp. AI qualifies, collects documents, calculates costs and submits to decision engine.

chatMessages.text: I'd like to apply for a personal loan of $15,000. How do I get started?
Great, I can help you with that right here! First, I'll need a photo of your government-issued ID (front and back). You can send it as an image.
Here you go. [Photo attached]
ID verified successfully! Now I need your last 2 pay stubs or proof of income. You can take a photo or send a PDF.
[Document attached] Here are my last two pay stubs.
All documents validated! Based on your profile, you're pre-approved for $15,000 at 1.2% monthly rate, 24 installments of $742. The contract is ready for your digital signature. Shall I send it?

creditSimulation.name: Credit Simulation
creditSimulation.description: Customer simulates a loan directly on WhatsApp. AI chats, calculates installments and generates personalized proposal.

chatMessages.text: I want to see how much a $20,000 loan would cost per month.
Sure! Let me run a few scenarios for you. How many months would you like to pay it off -- 12, 24, or 36?
Show me 24 and 36 months please.

Here are your options:
- 24 months: $945/mo (rate: 1.1%)
- 36 months: $685/mo (rate: 1.2%)
Both include insurance coverage at no extra cost.
The 36-month option looks good. Can I apply now?
Absolutely! I'm saving your simulation and starting the application process. I just need your full name and ID number to get started. You'll have a decision in under 15 minutes!

debtRenegotiation.name: Debt Renegotiation
debtRenegotiation.description: AI agent negotiates debts with empathy. Generates payment slip, sends payment link and records agreement -- humanized at scale.

chatMessages.text: I received a message about an overdue balance. I want to sort this out but I really can't pay the full $3,500.
Thank you for reaching out -- that's already a great first step! Let me see what options I can put together for you. What monthly payment amount would be comfortable?
Honestly, around $300/month is the max I can handle right now.

I can work with that! Here's what I can offer:
- Option A: $300/mo for 10 months (15% discount = $2,975 total)
- Option B: One-time payment of $2,450 (30% discount)
Which do you prefer?
Option A please. $300/month works for my budget.

Deal confirmed! First payment due on March 1st. Here's your payment link: pay.example.com/rn/4829. You'll receive automatic reminders before each due date. Thank you for settling this -- you're all set!

openFinanceCredit.name: Open Finance Credit
openFinanceCredit.description: Credit analysis enriched with Open Finance data. Queries real history and offers personalized rates in minutes.

chatMessages.text: I'd like to get a credit offer. I heard you can give better rates if I share my bank data?
Exactly! Through Open Finance, we can access your real financial history (with your permission) and offer personalized rates. To start, I need your consent. Here's the secure authorization link:
Done, I just authorized it.
Your data is being analyzed... Based on your income history, spending patterns, and excellent payment record across 3 institutions, you qualify for our best tier!
That's great! What rate can you offer?
Your personalized rate is 0.89%/month -- 40% lower than our standard rate. For a $10,000 loan over 24 months, that's $462/mo. Want me to start the application?

insuranceQuote.name: Insurance Quote
insuranceQuote.description: AI agent quotes, calculates premium and closes insurance on WhatsApp. Conversational, fast and personalized.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I need auto insurance for my 2023 Honda Civic. Can you give me a quote?
Of course! Let me get you a quick quote. A few details: What's your zip code, and approximately how many miles do you drive per year?
Zip 10001, about 12,000 miles a year. Clean driving record.

Excellent! With your clean record and low mileage, here's your quote:
- Basic coverage: $89/mo
- Full coverage: $142/mo
- Premium (includes roadside + rental): $168/mo
The full coverage sounds right. Can I sign up now?
Absolutely! I'm generating your policy right now. I just need your driver's license number and preferred payment method. Coverage starts tomorrow at 12:01 AM!

kycOnboarding.name: KYC Onboarding
kycOnboarding.description: Know Your Customer 100% on WhatsApp. Requests documents, analyzes with AI, validates data and creates account automatically.

chatMessages.text: I want to open an account. What do I need?
Welcome! The process takes about 5 minutes, all right here. First, please send a photo of the front of your government-issued ID.
[Photo attached] Here's the front.
ID captured and verified! Name and date of birth extracted. Now I need a quick selfie for facial verification -- please look directly at the camera.
[Selfie attached]
Face match confirmed (99.2% confidence). Your identity is verified! Your account is now active. Welcome aboard! Here's your account number: 4820-1. You can start using all features right away.

digitalAccount.name: Digital Account Opening
digitalAccount.description: Complete KYC on WhatsApp in minutes. From document photo to active account, fully automated.

chatMessages.text: I want to open a digital checking account. Is it really all done through WhatsApp?
Yes, 100% right here! It takes about 8 minutes. Let's start -- please send a clear photo of your driver's license or passport.
[Photo attached] Here's my driver's license.
Document validated! I've extracted your details. Now I need to verify your address -- please send a recent utility bill or bank statement.
[Document attached] Here's my electric bill from last month.

Address confirmed! Your digital account is now active:
- Account: 7391-2
- Agency: 0001
- Your virtual debit card is ready in the app.
Welcome! You can make transfers, pay bills, and invest starting now.

userOnboarding.name: SaaS User Onboarding
userOnboarding.description: Guide new users through the product via WhatsApp. Tutorials, questions and feedback -- all conversational.

chatMessages.text: Welcome to TaskFlow, Emma! I'm your setup assistant. Ready to get started with a quick 3-step setup?
Sure, let's do it!
Step 1: Create your first project. Go to Dashboard > New Project and give it a name. Let me know when you're done!
Done! I created 'Q1 Marketing Plan'.
Awesome! Step 2: Invite your team. Go to Settings > Team Members and add their emails. You can start with 2-3 people. This is where the magic happens!
Added 3 teammates. This is way simpler than I expected! What's step 3?

enrollment.name: Automated Enrollment
enrollment.description: Student capture and enrollment 100% on WhatsApp. Presents courses, collects data and sends enrollment link.

chatMessages.text: Hi, I'm interested in data science courses. What programs do you offer?

Great choice! We have 3 data science programs:
1. Data Analytics Fundamentals (3 months) - $299
2. Data Science Bootcamp (6 months) - $799
3. Machine Learning Specialization (4 months) - $599
Which level matches your experience?
I have some Python experience. The Bootcamp sounds interesting. When does it start?
Perfect fit! The next cohort starts March 15th with 20 spots remaining. Classes are Tue/Thu evenings + Saturday mornings. Want to secure your spot?
Yes, how do I enroll?
I just need your full name and email to reserve your spot. Here's the enrollment link with an early-bird 10% discount (valid for 48h): enroll.academy.com/ds-bootcamp. Welcome to the cohort!

campaigns.name: WhatsApp Campaigns
campaigns.description: Bulk sending with AI personalization. Segment your base, create unique messages and track results.

chatMessages.text: Hey David! Based on your recent purchase of running shoes, we thought you'd love our new moisture-wicking sports socks -- 25% off this week only!
Oh nice, I was actually looking for good running socks! What colors do you have?
We have Black, Navy, and Neon Green in your size (10). The 3-pack is $18.75 instead of $25. Free shipping on orders over $15!
I'll take the 3-pack. How do I order?
Here's your personalized checkout link with the discount already applied: shop.example.com/d/4k92. Your socks will arrive in 2-3 business days!
Just ordered. Thanks for the recommendation, spot on!

cartRecovery.name: Cart Recovery
cartRecovery.description: Recover lost sales with conversational AI. Detects abandoned cart, offers coupon and facilitates purchase.

chatMessages.text: Hi Rachel! You left some great items in your cart -- a leather tote bag and a silk scarf ($175 total). Still thinking about them?
Yeah, I liked them but the total was a bit more than I planned to spend.
I get that! Here's a special offer just for you: use code COMEBACK15 for 15% off your cart. That brings it down to $148.75 with free shipping!
Ooh that's tempting. Is the leather tote still in stock in brown?
Yes! The brown leather tote is in stock -- only 3 left though. Your cart is saved and the coupon is applied. Here's your checkout link: shop.example.com/cart/r892
Just completed the purchase. Love the discount, thanks!

npsFeedback.name: NPS & Feedback Collection
npsFeedback.description: Conversational survey with 5x higher response rate. Collects NPS, categorizes and alerts team automatically.

chatMessages.text: Hi Michael! Thanks for using our service today. Quick question: on a scale of 0-10, how likely are you to recommend us to a friend?
I'd say 9. Really happy with the service.
That's wonderful to hear! What did you like most about your experience?
The speed. I expected to wait days for a response and got help in under a minute.
Thanks for sharing that! Is there anything we could do to make it a perfect 10?
Maybe add video tutorials for the advanced features. That would be really helpful.

proactiveRenewal.name: Proactive Renewal
proactiveRenewal.description: Automatic reminder 30 days before expiration. AI agent negotiates conditions and sends payment link.

chatMessages.text: Hi Tom! Your home insurance policy expires in 30 days (April 15th). I've prepared a renewal offer with an exclusive 10% loyalty discount. Shall I share the details?
Oh right, I totally forgot about that. What's the renewal price?
With your loyalty discount, it's $1,080/year instead of $1,200. Same great coverage, and I can also add flood protection for just $8/month more. Interested?
Yes, add the flood protection too. We had a scare last year.
Smart move! Your new total is $1,176/year ($98/month) with flood coverage included. Shall I process the renewal now?
Here's your secure payment link: pay.insure.com/rnw/t482. Once confirmed, your new policy starts seamlessly on April 15th. No coverage gaps!

claimNotification.name: Claim Notification
claimNotification.description: From accident to process opening in 10 minutes. Photos, audio and documents analyzed by AI on WhatsApp.

chatMessages.text: I just had a car accident in the parking lot. I need to file a claim.
I'm sorry to hear that! I hope you're okay. Let me help you file the claim right now. First, are you or anyone else injured?
No, everyone is fine. Just damage to my rear bumper.
Glad everyone is safe. Please send me 4 photos: front, back, left side, and a close-up of the damage. Take them from about 3 feet away.
[4 photos attached] Here are all four angles.

Photos analyzed! I've detected rear bumper damage, moderate severity. Your claim #CLM-2847 is now open. An adjuster will contact you within 24 hours. Estimated repair: $1,200-1,800. Your deductible is $500.

digitalInspection.name: Digital Inspection
digitalInspection.description: Vehicle photos analyzed by AI in minutes. No in-person inspector, 100% on WhatsApp.

chatMessages.text: I need to do the vehicle inspection for my new insurance policy.

No need to visit a shop -- we can do it right here! Park your car in a well-lit area and send me these 7 photos:
1. Front
2. Back
3. Left side
4. Right side
5. Dashboard/odometer
6. VIN plate
7. Any existing damage
[7 photos attached] Here they all are. There's a small scratch on the left door.
Photos received and being analyzed by AI... All 7 images are clear and valid. Scratch on left door detected and documented.
How long until I get the result?
It's done! Vehicle condition: Good (minor cosmetic wear noted). Inspection APPROVED. Your policy can now be activated. The full inspection report has been sent to your email.

digitalMenu.name: Digital Menu & Orders
digitalMenu.description: Receive orders on WhatsApp 24/7. AI shows menu, takes orders, calculates total and coordinates delivery.

chatMessages.text: Hi! I'd like to place a delivery order.

Welcome! Here's today's menu highlights:
- Classic Burger: $12.90
- Margherita Pizza: $15.90
- Caesar Salad: $9.90
- Grilled Salmon: $22.90
Want to see the full menu or ready to order?
I'll have 2 Classic Burgers and 1 Caesar Salad. Can I add extra bacon to the burgers?

Got it! 2x Classic Burger (+bacon, $1.50 each) + 1x Caesar Salad.
Subtotal: $38.70
Delivery: $3.00
Total: $41.70
Anything else?
Add a chocolate milkshake. That's it!
Updated total: $48.60 (milkshake $6.90). Order confirmed! Estimated delivery: 35-45 minutes. Pay on delivery or via this link: pay.menu.com/ord/8291. Enjoy your meal!

conversationalPix.name: Conversational Pix
conversationalPix.description: Transfers via text or voice message. AI transcribes, extracts data and executes Pix in seconds.

chatMessages.text: I need to send $250 to my landlord's Pix key.
Sure! What's the Pix key? It can be an email, phone number, or random key.
It's landlord@realty.com

Found it! Transfer details:
- To: James Peterson (landlord@realty.com)
- Amount: $250.00
- From: Your checking account
Please confirm with YES to proceed.
YES
Transfer complete! $250.00 sent to James Peterson. Transaction ID: PIX-8429301. Receipt saved to your transaction history. Anything else?

smartScheduling.name: Smart Scheduling
smartScheduling.description: Finds available time slots, schedules meetings and sends automatic reminders -- all on WhatsApp.

chatMessages.text: I'd like to schedule a consultation with a financial advisor.
I'd be happy to help! We have availability this week. Do you prefer mornings or afternoons?
Afternoons work best, ideally Wednesday or Thursday.

Here are the available slots:
- Wed, 2:00 PM - Maria Santos
- Wed, 4:30 PM - Carlos Lima
- Thu, 1:00 PM - Maria Santos
- Thu, 3:00 PM - Carlos Lima
Which one works for you?
Wednesday at 2 PM with Maria, please.
Booked! Wed at 2:00 PM with Maria Santos, Office 302. I'll send you a reminder 1 hour before. If you need to reschedule, just message me anytime!

healthScheduling.name: Medical Appointment Scheduling
healthScheduling.description: Clinic with smart 24/7 scheduling. Identifies specialty, books appointment and sends reminder.

chatMessages.text: I need to schedule a dermatology appointment. I have a skin rash that's been bothering me.
I'll help you schedule that. We have two dermatologists available. Do you have insurance, and do you have a preference for doctor?
I have BlueCross insurance. No preference on the doctor.

BlueCross is accepted! Available appointments:
- Dr. Sarah Chen: Mon 3/3 at 10 AM
- Dr. Sarah Chen: Wed 3/5 at 2 PM
- Dr. James Park: Tue 3/4 at 11 AM
Which works best?
Tuesday at 11 AM please.
Confirmed! Tue March 4th at 11 AM with Dr. James Park, Room 204. Please bring your insurance card and arrive 10 minutes early. I'll send a reminder the day before. Get well soon!

notifications.name: Transactional Notifications
notifications.description: Payment reminders, status updates and alerts -- all on WhatsApp with 91% open rate.

chatMessages.text: Hi Ana! Your payment of $89.90 for order #45210 has been confirmed. Your package ships today!
Great! When should I expect delivery?
Estimated delivery: Thursday, March 6th between 9 AM - 12 PM. I'll send you the tracking link as soon as it's dispatched.
Perfect, thanks!
Update: Your package is on its way! Tracking: track.delivery.com/pkg/45210. The driver is 3 stops away.
Package delivered! If everything looks good, we'd love a quick review. Enjoy your purchase, Ana!

appOriginacaoCredito.name: Credit Origination System
appOriginacaoCredito.description: Full backend for credit origination with automated risk analysis, integrated KYC, digital signature and disbursement — with native audit trail and LGPD compliance.

{"ssn": "123-**-****", "amount": 50000}

appBackofficeSeguros.description: Policy, claims and renewal management with integrated workflow, digital signature and complete audit trail.

Decision Engine: coverage confirmed
Estimated value: $8,500

Payment scheduled: $8,500

appHubOnboarding.description: Data collection, document validation and step-by-step approval with internal system integration and audit trail.

{"name": "Jane Smith", "email": "jane@..."}

Pending documents: 2
Upload link sent
GET /api/onboarding/ONB-789/status

Docs validated: 2/2
Credentials created
Systems synced: 3

appApiPagamentos.name: Unified Payments API
appApiPagamentos.description: Bank transfer, invoice and card payments with automatic reconciliation, payment splitting and audit trail — all via a single API.

chatMessages.text:
POST /api/payments/charge
{"method": "ach", "amount": 1500}

200 OK — ACH initiated
Reference: available
Expiry: 30 min
Split: 90% merchant, 10% platform
GET /api/payments/PAY-456/status

200 OK — Status: PAID
Amount: $1,500.00
Reconciled: yes
Audit trail: 4 records

appAssinaturaDigital.description: Digital contracts with electronic signature, legal validity, secure storage and automatic certification.

{"template": "loan_agreement", "signers": 2}

Signatories notified: 2
Signing link sent
GET /api/signatures/SIG-2024-321/status

200 OK — Status: SIGNED
Signatures: 2/2 complete
Certificate generated
Audit trail: 6 records

appOpenFinance.description: Connection to regulated Open Finance, financial profile analysis and native compliance built in.

chatMessages.text:
POST /api/openfinance/consent
{"id": "123-**-****", "banks": ["chase", "bofa"]}

200 OK — Consent recorded
Data obtained: 2 banks
Transactions analyzed: 847
GET /api/openfinance/profile/abc123

Estimated income: $12,000
Debt ratio: 28%
Consent: active

appGestaoSinistros.name: Digital Claims Management
appGestaoSinistros.description: Claims registration, analysis and resolution with OCR, Decision Engine and automatic notifications.

chatMessages.text:
POST /api/claims/submit
{"policy": "POL-123", "type": "theft", "docs": [...]}
